overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts' Great Hall, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students in robes are seated at long wooden tables beneath towering stained glass windows, with the camera slowly panning across the atmospheric candlelit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the great hall from an elevated position, observing the students dining below

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended by magic, creating the primary warm illumination
tall gothic arched windows with blue and purple stained glass filtering exterior light
rows of dark wooden house tables with students seated on benches
grey stone walls with gothic architectural details and mounted torch sconces
lit wall-mounted torches providing additional warm lighting along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans across a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in the warm golden glow of thousands of floating candles. Students in dark robes are seated at long wooden tables below, while towering stained glass windows line the far wall. The stone architecture features high vaulted ceilings and ornate wall sconces, creating an atmospheric, magical environment typical of a fantasy game setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a magnificent gothic dining hall that emphasizes the scale and magical atmosphere of the interior. It begins by capturing the warm golden glow of thousands of floating candles suspended beneath high vaulted ceilings. As the camera glides forward, the view expands to reveal students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, grounding the ethereal lighting with a sense of lived-in community. The scene then shifts its focus toward the far wall, where towering stained glass windows and ornate stone sconces complete the immersive fantasy environment.
